pi_items.source: setup_task.sh assigns DATA_FILE and downloads the source image to this specific path.
task.json instructions require the x-axis to be the Red band (band_3), and export_result.sh checks for "band_3" in the exported data.
task.json instructions require the y-axis to be the NIR band (band_2), and export_result.sh checks for "band_2" in the exported data.
export_result.sh explicitly searches for soil_line_plot.png within /home/ga/snap_exports as the primary target location.
export_result.sh explicitly searches for soil_line_data.txt (and .csv) within /home/ga/snap_exports to validate the underlying data export.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real 4-band Landsat GeoTIFF sample of California downloaded from the opengeos data repository. The dataset is configured at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The verifier script expects the agent to use "band_3" for the x-axis and "band_2" for the y-axis when plotting the soil line. Successful completion is evaluated based on the presence of a plot image at /home/ga/snap_exports/soil_line_plot.png and a corresponding data export file at /home/ga/snap_exports/soil_line_data.txt.
